items.title: [Steam论坛] New Player Handbook Guide
items.summary:
This is a very comprehensive guide for new and returning players https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.kxd9lri5r74q.
It contains about everything you could need for a good start and links to other important resources (in the future, it could also be found on a dedicated site).
Free to ask on Discord if in need of anything....
items.author: SUSKIWY

items.title: [Steam论坛] What should I get with D-Jewels?
items.summary: I have stashed 54,000 D-Jewels and am unsure how to use them. I have already got Aigis and Aurita maxed out, have only one Erica (E0) and none of the three wheels there available for purchase. What do you recommend?
items.author: Fanta

items.title: [Steam论坛] Traphase Password Mode anyone?
items.summary: Looking for someone to do Traphase through the Password Mode system. It's worth an achievement by itself and required for a second achievement. Plus we can do the Another Round achievement on top of that if you like. Each one of these achievements is worth 100 Silver. I'm not even picky which of us wins or loses the duel....
items.author: Zorlond
